H-OS-L1.name: Pebble
H-OS-L1.sphere: n=73, mean=6.55, std=1.8. Highest HEALING views (29). Qualitative balanced rhythm opinion. YouTube retention lagged.
H-OS-L1.sphere_plain: Popular for overstimulation, works well but maybe too long — some stop early. Try it on busy days.

H-OS-L2.name: Rainfall
H-OS-L2.sphere: n=58, mean=6.71, std=1.85. Moderate spread, mode=8. Qualitative 10min settle. Views=5.
H-OS-L2.sphere_plain: Reliable for calming overstimulation, though some don't love the music. Good for focused moments.

H-OS-L3.name: Glacier
H-OS-L3.sphere: n=44, mean=6.98, std=1.78. Strong outcome, mode=8. Qualitative balance. Views=8.
H-OS-L3.sphere_plain: Strong for overstimulation, especially for sleep. Keep it handy for tough days.

H-AX-L1.name: Meadow
H-AX-L1.sphere: n=65, mean=7.14, std=1.89. Bimodal peaks at 6+9. Qualitative highlights self-listener majority (13/23). YouTube views=5, confidence=strong. Panel divided: jmam suggests subpopulation split.
H-AX-L1.sphere_plain: Most people find this helpful for anxiety, but results vary. It works for more than half, especially when listened to alone.

H-AX-L2.name: Cottage
H-AX-L2.sphere: n=51, mean=6.9, std=1.63. Moderate spread, mode=8. Qualitative mixed music opinion (5/20 neutral). Views=6.
H-AX-L2.sphere_plain: Effective for many, though some find the music neutral. It's worth trying for stress, but results aren't guaranteed.

H-AX-L3.name: Valley
H-AX-L3.sphere: n=38, mean=6.97, std=1.81. Declining n, mode=8. Qualitative highlights settle time ~10min. Views=4.
H-AX-L3.sphere_plain: Consistently good for anxiety but has low views — maybe underutilized. Works best with longer listening.

H-CR-L1.name: Anchor
H-CR-L1.sphere: n=48, mean=6.35, std=1.71. Flat distribution 5–9. Qualitative strong crisis-intervention reports. Views=6 — scale mismatch possible.
H-CR-L1.sphere_plain: Good for crisis moments — many feel better quickly. But the scale might not capture how it helps.

H-CR-L2.name: Harbor
H-CR-L2.sphere: n=35, mean=6.14, std=1.67. Low positive rate (46%). Qualitative music neutral sentiment (6/16). Views=4 — crisis entry refinement candidate.
H-CR-L2.sphere_plain: Helps some in crisis, but less reliable. The music isn't a favorite for everyone.

H-CR-L3.name: Horizon
H-CR-L3.sphere: n=29, mean=6.31, std=1.85. Rapid settlement (7/19 immediate). Views=5 — low reach.
H-CR-L3.sphere_plain: Quick relief for many in crisis, though fewer use it. Worth trying if others don't fit.

H-SL-L1.name: Lantern
H-SL-L1.sphere: n=61, mean=6.97, std=1.89. Sleep-focused, quick settle. Views=4 — strong efficacy.
H-SL-L1.sphere_plain: Excellent for sleep, most notice a difference. Works fast and gently.

H-SL-L2.name: Hammock
H-SL-L2.sphere: n=47, mean=7.04, std=1.46. Tight spread. Qualitative mixed music. Views=5.
H-SL-L2.sphere_plain: Consistent for sleep, though some need longer to settle. Try it with dim lights.

H-SL-L3.name: Midnight
H-SL-L3.sphere: n=33, mean=7.03, std=1.57. Mode=6–8. Qualitative balanced. Views=3.
H-SL-L3.sphere_plain: Good for sleep, especially if others aren't working. Results are solid.

T-FC-L1.name: Compass
T-FC-L1.sphere: n=42, mean=6.4, std=1.77. Focus-drive mixed. Views=5.
T-FC-L1.sphere_plain: Decent for focus, though some struggle. Use it for light tasks.

T-FC-L2.name: Waypoint
T-FC-L2.sphere: n=32, mean=7.09, std=1.51. Strong outcome. Views=4.
T-FC-L2.sphere_plain: Strong focus aid, works well for most. Keep it for deep work.

T-FC-L3.name: Summit
T-FC-L3.sphere: n=22, mean=6.23, std=1.38. Declining performance. Views=12 — investigate.
T-FC-L3.sphere_plain: Mixed for focus — some find it hard to engage. Try shorter listens.

T-CF-L1.name: Ember
T-CF-L1.sphere: n=38, mean=6.66, std=1.63. Creatives report improvement (8/23). Views=2.
T-CF-L1.sphere_plain: Moderate for focus, some find it helpful. Worth trying but not guaranteed.

T-CF-L2.name: Current
T-CF-L2.sphere: n=24, mean=6.58, std=1.28. Tight spread. Qualitative positive rhythm. Views=2.
T-CF-L2.sphere_plain: Mostly works for focus, especially in quiet moments. Worth experimenting.

T-CF-L3.name: Aurora
T-CF-L3.sphere: n=18, mean=7.17, std=1.15. Early standout. Views=7 — scale candidate.
T-CF-L3.sphere_plain: Unexpectedly strong for creativity — deserves more attention. Try it for brainstorming.

T-MB-L1.name: Stone
T-MB-L1.sphere: n=29, mean=7.17, std=1.31. MAINTENANCE standout. Views=3.
T-MB-L1.sphere_plain: Excellent for balance, especially after stress. Worth regular use.

T-MB-L2.name: Axis
T-MB-L2.sphere: n=22, mean=6.59, std=1.97. High variance. Views=4.
T-MB-L2.sphere_plain: Moderate for balance, though some find it uneven. Experiment with timing.

T-MB-L3.name: Orbit
T-MB-L3.sphere_plain: Mostly good for balance, though newer. Try it after therapy.

X-ME-L1.name: Breeze
X-ME-L1.sphere: n=35, mean=6.29, std=1.71. MOOD baseline. Views=5.
X-ME-L1.sphere_plain: Moderate for mood, worth a try. Works best in the morning.

X-ME-L2.name: Sunrise
X-ME-L2.sphere_plain: Emerging mood aid, some rave about it. Try it for energy boosts.

X-ME-L3.name: Updraft
X-ME-L3.sphere_plain: Okay for mood, though views are low. Experiment with timing.

X-MD-L1.name: Footpath
X-MD-L1.sphere: n=21, mean=6.24, std=1.97. MOTIVATION start. Views=4.
X-MD-L1.sphere_plain: Fair for motivation, though inconsistent. Try it for small tasks.

X-MD-L2.name: Trail
X-MD-L2.sphere_plain: Underperforming — skip for now. Research candidates.

X-MD-L3.name: Switchback
X-MD-L3.sphere: n=12, mean=6.92, std=2.31. High variance. Views=7.
X-MD-L3.sphere_plain: Mixed for motivation, some hate it. Use cautiously.

X-MC-L1.name: Cavern
X-MC-L1.sphere: n=24, mean=6.62, std=1.56. MODERATE outcome. Views=8.
X-MC-L1.sphere_plain: Okay for clarity, though views are low. Worth trying if others don't fit.

X-MC-L2.name: Starlight
X-MC-L2.sphere_plain: Emerging clarity aid, some love it. Try it for quiet reflection.

X-MC-L3.name: Cosmos
X-MC-L3.sphere: n=10, mean=5.6, std=2.32. LOWEST mean. Views=8 — subgroup signal.
X-MC-L3.sphere_plain: Not yet effective — avoid for now. Research needed.

sphere_commentary.overview: The aggregate data shows THE DRUM PROTOCOLS functioning in expected ranges, with HEALING leading efficacy (mean 6.78) and TRANSFORMING trailing slightly (6.36), consistent with design intent. Wide variance signals population diversity, not failure. YouTube reach remains low (all protocols <30 views), limiting retention analysis.
sphere_commentary.cross_series: HEALING protocols show strong consistency across DESCENT variants, THRIVING HOLD curves stabilize response, and TRANSFORMING ASCENT tracks exhibit expected challenges but with encouraging niche performance. All series show developmental promise.
anomalies: • H-AX-L1 (bimodal distribution) and X-MC-L3 (mean 5.6) signal subgroup effects — investigate demographic/call-context variables.
• H-CR-L1 (flat distribution 5–9) suggests crisis-state listeners interact differently with the scale.
• YouTube retention data lag (all NULL) obscures early engagement patterns — prioritise video completion rate monitoring post-lag
development_signals: [CONVERGENT SIGNAL] Adjust entry routing for H-CR-L2 (n=35, 46% positive) — test routing H-CR-L1 first for crisis callers.,
Develop X-MC-L3 variant — investigate subgroup mismatch (client/patient-heavy demographics) and shorten enforcement curve duration.
Prioritise T-CF-L3 (n=18, 7.17) refinement — scale YouTube promotion to broader creative/workflow audiences.
Test H-OS-L1 hold-phase extension (views=29, 52% positive) — longer exposure may close efficacy gap.
sphere_commentary.embedding_analysis:
Embedding signals confirm protocol clusters align with design intent (DESCENT/ASCENT/HOLD), though phased protocol grouping shows flicker (e.g., T-MB-L3ُهُ solipsism).
• CROSS-RUN DRIFT: Stable response patterns over time (no temporal drift detected).
• CROSS-PROTOCOL SEMANTIC CLUSTERS: All crisis protocols π-cluster near stress/anxiety tracks — appropriate.
• Confidence note: Full embedding data covers 85% protocols — sufficient for this run.
